exemptions: resident and permit holders and service vehicles
source_text: Blithedale Street: No vehicle of any description, except those of resident and permit holders and service vehicles, shall go upon Blithedale Street between 8:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m. school days.

exemptions: resident and permit holders and service vehicles
source_text: Kimball Terrace: No vehicle of any description, except those of resident and permit holders and service vehicles, shall go upon Kimball Terrace between 8:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m. when public schools of the city are in session.

exemptions: resident and permit holders and service vehicles
source_text: Lasell Street: No vehicle of any description, except those of resident and permit holders and service vehicles, shall go upon Lasell Street between 7:00 a.m. and 4:00 p.m. when public schools of the city are in session.

exemptions: property owners whose access is Minot Place, and service vehicles
source_text: Minot Place: No vehicle of any description, except those of property owners whose access is Minot Place, and service vehicles, shall go upon Minot Place between 7:45 a.m. and 4:00 p.m. on any day when the public schools of the city are in session.

exemptions: property owners whose properties abut Norwood Avenue or Parkview Avenue
source_text: Norwood Avenue: No vehicle of any description, except those of property owners whose properties abut Norwood Avenue or Parkview Avenue, shall enter Norwood Avenue in the easterly direction, to the east of Bridges Avenue.
